title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 21/03/2023
Image reference: 2023-03-21_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-21-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have firmed
Capesize (Newcastlemax) MP The Vrabel and MP The Burschi (208,300 DWT, Jan 2021, Aug 2020, Jiangsu Yangzi Xinfu) sold to Tomini Shipping in an en bloc deal for USD 121 mil, VV Value USD 97.51 mil - Inc TC. Capesize Aquahaha and Aquatonka (179,000 DWT, Feb 2012, Hanjin Subic) sold to Norden in an en bloc deal for USD 56.40 mil, VV Value USD 55.20 mil - BWTS. Capesize Mount Faber (176,900 DWT, Mar 2008, Namura) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 22.70 mil, VV Value USD 21.11 mil - Scrubber.
